use_cases: Display user-generated social media posts in a feed or timeline view
Showcase product announcements or marketing content with images
Create activity feeds in community or collaboration platforms
Build social proof sections for portfolio or profile pages
Display user reviews or testimonials with visual media
ai_summary: A minimalist social media post card component featuring a user header with avatar, display name, handle, and timestamp; rich text content; an embedded image; and interactive like and bookmark toggle buttons. The card uses rounded corners, subtle borders, and soft shadows for a clean, modern appearance suitable for feed layouts and social platforms.
